reviewText: everyone keeps calling this cosy but it's just cramped and loud and somehow still charging seven quid for coffee like discomfort is part of the concept
guy behind the counter remembered i only buy the weird mint gum when i've had a bad day. hate that this made me emotional
the coffee is fine but the line has this very sf energy where everyone looks like they are either underpaid, overfunded, or both
best thing about this place is nobody acts like they discovered it five minutes ago. barcelona desperately needs more rooms with that energy
